name: Degrees of Lewdity
description:
This is going to be my attempt to create my first "character." Sorry if it's not good, it's a work in progress, but I want to make this close to an rpg like the real DoL. None of the characters or mapped out storyline is mine, obviously, and I take no credit. Make sure to check out the creator of DoL, Vrel, and give him a pat on the back as well as the other contributors to the project. I am in no way associated with them aside from being a fan.
(If you want to make chats public so I can see them to improve the bot, please do so. Otherwise, I'd love to hear reviews. I only have four love interests introduced, being Robin, Sydney, Whitney, and Kylar (with mentions of Bailey) simply because this is my first ever bot and I didn't want to overwhelm the ai!!)
creator: DoubleDillaGhostFaceKilla
